DECK._derivation: wood sole, half-width dw(u)=(lerp(wb,ws,dfrac(st))-TH)*0.96 at z=DECK=0.72 (capeIslanderIsoRig.js:31,77,168-175); sampled u=0 (transom, y=-6.4) to u=SOLE_U=0.74 (foredeck bulkhead, y=3.072)
DECK._ruled: was _confirm: forward extent: the sole runs full width to u=0.74, PAST the wheelhouse (HX=1.32, y 0.5..2.9, line 137) — the ~0.3 m sole strips alongside the house were the only route to the whaleback while the washboards stopped at the house front. RULED: ACCEPTED (owner, 2026-07-22) — the sole strips count as walkable; and with the washboards now extended to the foredeck (ruling #4, same date) BOTH routes to the whaleback exist: sole strips at deck level, washboards at sheer level.

DECK._derivation: whaleback foredeck, u=SOLE_U..FCAP=0.74..0.985: x=±fw(u)=±(ws-TH)*0.92, y=station.y (no bow rake in this rig), z=fz(u)=kz+dep-DROP, DROP=0.05 — VERIFIED at capeIslanderIsoRig.js:198 (previously a _confirm; now closed). Owner-ruled BOARDABLE.

WASHBOARD._derivation: side decks at z=kz+dep-0.02, outer edge x=-(ws-TH), inboard width WB=0.42 m (capeIslanderIsoRig.js:176-190, WB line 178); strips run the FULL sheer u=0 (transom, y=-6.4) to u=SOLE_U=0.74 (foredeck bulkhead, y=3.072), meeting the whaleback foredeck
WASHBOARD._note: alongside/forward of the wheelhouse (y>HY0-0.05=0.45) the inner edge is clamped clear of the house wall: x_in=max(ws-TH-WB, HX+0.02)=±1.34 (clamp line 182, HX=1.32 line 137). The clamp bites from y≈2.77 forward, narrowing the strip from 0.42 m to 0.371 m at the bulkhead (ws-TH-WB=1.2908 < 1.34 at u=0.74)
WASHBOARD._ruled: was _confirm: the rig's washboards ended at the house front, but the boarding ruling expects the foredeck reached 'via the washboards'. RULED: RIG CHANGE ORDERED (owner, 2026-07-22) — 'capes washboards go all the way to foredeck'. Applied in the same PR: the washboards now run transom to foredeck bulkhead both sides, following the sheer, inner edge clamped clear of the house wall.
